text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike during the Osaka Hai, the fans have come
with high expectations for Agnes Tachyon in this
year's autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon shows no sign of nervousness as
she makes her way to prove once and for all who
the medium-distance champion is.
